steps.title: Match coefficients
steps.content: The left side is $3x^2 + ax$ and the right side is $3x^2 + 8x$. The $x^2$ coefficients already match. Matching the $x$ coefficients: $a = 8$.

steps.title: Identify the correct choice
steps.content:
• Choice A — 3: $a = 3$ would give $3x^2 + 3x$, but $x(3x+8) = 3x^2 + 8x$. ✗
  • Choice B — 4: $a = 4$ would give $3x^2 + 4x$. Does not match $3x^2 + 8x$. ✗
  • Choice C — 5: $a = 5$ would give $3x^2 + 5x$. Does not match $3x^2 + 8x$. ✗
  • Choice D — 8: $a = 8$ gives $3x^2 + 8x = x(3x + 8)$. ✓
D is correct.
